case_title: RICHARD HARDACK VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARNCE BY PLAINTIFF RICHARD HARDACK. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
